message: I am the Evolution Scholar of Bellom. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Ancient Specter into Shadow Minotaur.
I can evolve Shadow Minotaur into Thunder Serpent.
I can evolve Arcane Golem into Crystal Tiger.
I can evolve Crystal Tiger into Mystic Wolf.
I can evolve Wild Serpent into Shadow Leviathan.
I can evolve Shadow Leviathan into Infernal Basilisk.
I can evolve Mystic Specter into Astral Djinn.
I can evolve Astral Djinn into Wild Phoenix.

I can evolve Frozen Golem into Solar Manticore.
I can evolve Void Serpent into Lunar Manticore.
I can evolve Lunar Manticore into Crystal Cyclops.
I can evolve Frozen Specter into Celestial Basilisk.
I can evolve Celestial Basilisk into Mystic Drake.
I can evolve Solar Kraken into Frozen Basilisk.

I can evolve Solar Titan into Astral Wyvern.

I can evolve Mystic Wolf into Crystal Serpent.

I can evolve Wild Minotaur into Void Golem.
I can evolve Void Golem into Thunder Basilisk.
I can evolve Astral Leviathan into Thunder Specter.
I can evolve Thunder Specter into Shadow Djinn.
I can evolve Storm Griffin into Infernal Serpent.
I can evolve Infernal Serpent into Thunder Griffin.
I can evolve Void Phoenix into Ancient Griffin.
I can evolve Ancient Griffin into Thunder Wolf.
I can evolve Frozen Golem into Solar Drake.
I can evolve Solar Drake into Crystal Golem.
I can evolve Celestial Griffin into Shadow Cyclops.

I can evolve Shadow Tiger into Void Leviathan.
Choose a beast evolution.
